UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $input | ForEach-Object { \"[$timestamp] USER_QUESTION: $_\" | Add-Content -Path 'c:\Petar\TVZ\6. semestar\Razvoj web aplikacija u ASP.NET MVC tehnologiji\Projekt\projekt\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Encoding UTF8 }"

PreToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $input | ForEach-Object { \"[$timestamp] TOOL_USED: $_\" | Add-Content -Path 'c:\Petar\TVZ\6. semestar\Razvoj web aplikacija u ASP.NET MVC tehnologiji\Projekt\projekt\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Encoding UTF8 }"

PostToolUse.command: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $input | ForEach-Object { \"[$timestamp] TOOL_RESULT: $_\" | Add-Content -Path 'c:\Petar\TVZ\6. semestar\Razvoj web aplikacija u ASP.NET MVC tehnologiji\Projekt\projekt\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt' -Encoding UTF8 }"
